title: TFTH
description: This modification adds an infection to the world that spreads aggressive flesh.
body:
The Flesh That Hates

Experience the true horror behind an assimilating infection!

 

Face the unstoppable carnage that has been awakened in the world of Minecraft. You don't know exactly what it is, you don't know how strong it is, you don't even know if you'll be able to fight it back. But one thing is sure: THE FLESH MUST DIE!

Infect your world!

 

The Flesh That Hates will infect your world. As soon as you hear a terrifying hum, it indicates the birth of a new Incubator. The longer an Incubator exists, the stronger the infection and the Incubator itself become. Fear will not save you, escape will not help, they will find you anyway.

Incubators!

Incubators are the beginning and the end of the entire infection. Incubators are capable of evolving, creating armies of flesh creatures, and much more unpleasantness.

 

Biomass

 

Biomass is a dynamic difficulty system which will affect the entire infection, punishes the players who ignore the infection and rewards the one who fight it. The Flesh will gain Biomass by doing different activities. Biomass enhances the flesh creatures in various ways, and it's up to you to find out how!

The Flesh has many ways to acquire biomass, at least through the killing of mobs.

 

Fight it back!

 

However, the Flesh will lose Biomass by destroying it: Breaking blocks, killing flesh creatures or killing Incubators. Each action will vary differently in how much Biomass you take fron the Flesh. There's also a way to fight the Flesh back, but you'll need to find it. Don't worry, it is actually quite obvious

**DISCORD LINK:**[https://discord.gg/QryK7xkZqW](https://discord.gg/QryK7xkZqW)
